w:r.w:t: Availability of object storage for file persistence.
Login page for register number/email and
Print-friendly layout for exporting grade view.
project scale (as provided by free-tier services).
to be mapped into marks records.
User submits login credentials (email/register number and password).
User accesses a protected endpoint with a token.
System displays previous PDF uploads along
with exam type stored as a separate attribute.
and displays them organized by exam type.
Admin logs in and opens the dashboard.
System shows counts of total users, PDF uploads, Excel uploads, and grade records.
confirmation for any destructive admin actions.
Internationalization is not required for initial version; English language support is sufficient.
